uses: Jacea procumbens, also known as Creeping Buttercup, has been used in traditional medicine for various purposes. The essential oils in Yarrow are primarily composed of monoterpenes, sesquiterpenes, and phenolic compounds. preparations: Jacea procumbens, also known as creeping wintergreen, is a plant that has been used in herbal preparations for its medicinal properties. The plant contains methyl salicylate, a compound similar to aspirin, which is used to treat pain and reduce inflammation.
